message:
chore(beads): close epic 1mfw3 — all 31 tasks verified as implemented

Systematic audit of all open beads in the FrankenTUI UX revelation pass
(1mfw3) confirmed every task was already implemented and tested. Closed
31 task-level beads, 5 feature beads, and the epic itself. UBS scan on
src/ui/ found no production safety issues (22 critical findings triaged
as test-only or false positives). Also applies cargo fmt to
deploy_cloudflare.rs from a prior agent's changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
